prompt: A hyper-realistic architectural photograph of a massive brutalist concrete structure. The building consists of several distinct, separate sections of ramps and stairways that each individually slope upwards towards the right. However, the overall macro-structure made by combining these sections undeniably forms a massive wedge sloping dramatically downwards to the right. The local upward ascent of every part directly contradicts the global downward descent of the whole. Eerie, overcast lighting, sharp shadows, uncanny spatial geometry, contradictory slope.
visual_logic: Individual structural ramps aggressively ascend, while the macro-wedge formed by these combined components plunges downwards. The contradiction makes local upward movement build a global descending form, embodying a trend that reverses upon aggregation.
